creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Hi koobs

* There is no fix to be separated, the fix is related to the new version only
* the fix is not yet upstreamed, I'll do it soon
* it passes poudriere on all supported FreeBSD version (9.3, 10.1, 10.2, 10.3, 11.0) and portlint looks fine.

Therefore, no MFH has to be performed
